meaning: n.(意大利地名)里沃纳,来亨鸡,麦秆编制的帽子
examples: In this state of mutual understanding, they reached Leghorn.
So they found that the white leghorn was nearly perfect for that.
As he had twenty times touched at Leghorn, he remembered a barber in St.
In September it launched services from Catania to Leghorn, well north of Rome.
Undeterred, he went to Leghorn (now Livorno) and established a successful medical practice.
